entries.title: Cell Theory
entries.content: All living things are made of cells. Cells come from pre-existing cells. The cell is the basic unit of life.

entries.title: DNA Structure
entries.content: DNA is a double helix of nucleotides (A-T, G-C pairs). Stores genetic instructions for building proteins.

entries.title: Photosynthesis
entries.content: Plants convert light energy into chemical energy (glucose), releasing oxygen.

entries.title: Cellular Respiration
entries.content: Cells break down glucose to produce ATP energy. Opposite overall reaction to photosynthesis.

entries.title: Natural Selection
entries.content: Organisms with traits better suited to their environment survive and reproduce more. Over generations, populations adapt.
